# Java Dependency Injection with Kafka Plugin Architecture

## Your Task

Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement the plugin/extension loading system: the PluginClassLoader, the plugin scanning via reflection, and the interface-based dependency injection used for Connector, Converter, and HeaderConverter plugins.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the crossorg domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/kafka--0753c489, sg-evals/flink--0cc95fcc, sg-evals/camel--1006f047.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/kafka--0753c489` (apache/kafka)
- `sg-evals/flink--0cc95fcc` (apache/flink)
- `sg-evals/camel--1006f047` (apache/camel)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?

I'll help you find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement the plugin/extension loading system. Let me start by exploring the workspace directory and then systematically search for the relevant components.

  "text": "The Apache Kafka Connect plugin/extension loading system is implemented through a sophisticated class loader isolation and plugin discovery architecture. The core components are located in the org.apache.kafka.connect.runtime.isolation package.\n\nKey Components:\n\n1. CLASS LOADER ISOLATION:\n- PluginClassLoader (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoader.java): Provides isolated class loading for individual plugins\n- DelegatingClassLoader (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java): Manages multiple plugin class loaders and delegates class loading\n- LoaderSwap (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/LoaderSwap.java): Handles context class loader swapping for plugin execution\n- ClassLoaderFactory (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ClassLoaderFactory.java): Factory for creating delegating class loaders\n- PluginClassLoaderFactory (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoaderFactory.java): Factory for creating plugin-specific class loaders\n\n2. PLUGIN SCANNING & DISCOVERY:\n- PluginScanner (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanner.java): Abstract interface defining plugin discovery\n- ReflectionScanner (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ReflectionScanner.java): Uses ClassGraph reflection to discover plugins in classpath\n- ServiceLoaderScanner (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java): Uses Java ServiceLoader mechanism for plugin discovery\n- PluginDiscoveryMode (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java): Configures which discovery strategies to use\n- PluginScanResult (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanResult.java): Holds results of plugin scanning\n- PluginSource (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginSource.java): Represents a source of plugins (JAR files in plugin paths)\n\n3. PLUGIN METADATA & UTILITIES:\n- PluginDesc (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDesc.java): Describes a discovered plugin (class name, version, type)\n- PluginType (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginType.java): Enum of plugin types (CONNECTOR, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, etc.)\n- PluginUtils (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginUtils.java): Utility methods for plugin path handling and location resolution\n- PluginsRecommenders (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java): Provides recommendations for available plugins\n- VersionedPluginLoadingException (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/VersionedPluginLoadingException.java): Exception for versioned plugin loading failures\n\n4. DEPENDENCY INJECTION & INSTANTIATION (Plugins.java):\n- Plugins (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/Plugins.java): Central class implementing dependency injection for all plugin types. Key methods:\n  - newConnector(String connectorClassOrAlias, VersionRange range): Creates connector instances\n  - newConverter(AbstractConfig config, String classPropertyName): Creates converter instances\n  - newHeaderConverter(AbstractConfig config, String classPropertyName): Creates header converter instances\n  - newPlugin(String klassName, AbstractConfig config, Class<T> pluginKlass): Generic plugin instantiation\n  - newTask(Class<? extends Task> taskClass): Creates task instances\n  - newConfigProvider(): Creates config provider instances\n  - Implements configuration injection via org.apache.kafka.common.Configurable.configure()\n\n5. PLUGIN INTERFACES (in connect/api):\n- Connector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Connector.java): Abstract base class for all connectors\n- SinkConnector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/sink/SinkConnector.java): Extends Connector for sink implementations\n- SourceConnector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/source/SourceConnector.java): Extends Connector for source implementations\n- Converter (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/Converter.java): Interface for data converters\n- HeaderConverter (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/HeaderConverter.java): Interface extending Configurable for header converters\n- Transformation (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/Transformation.java): Interface for record transformations, extends Configurable\n- Predicate (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/predicates/Predicate.java): Interface for transformation predicates\n- ConnectRestExtension (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/rest/ConnectRestExtension.java): Interface for REST extension plugins\n- ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java): Interface for config override policies\n- Task (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Task.java): Base interface for tasks\n- Versioned (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/components/Versioned.java): Interface for versioned components\n\n6. CONFIGURATION & VALIDATION:\n- Configurable (clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/Configurable.java): Core interface used for dependency injection - all plugin types implement this\n- ConfigProvider (clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/config/provider/ConfigProvider.java): Interface for external configuration providers\n- ConverterConfig (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/ConverterConfig.java): Configuration for converters\n- ConverterType (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/ConverterType.java): Enum for converter types (KEY, VALUE, HEADER)\n- InstantiableClassValidator (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/util/InstantiableClassValidator.java): Validates classes have public no-arg constructors\n- ConcreteSubClassValidator (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/util/ConcreteSubClassValidator.java): Validates classes are concrete subclasses\n\nARCHITECTURE FLOW:\n1. Plugin Discovery: ReflectionScanner and ServiceLoaderScanner scan plugin paths and classpath\n2. Plugin Metadata: Discovered plugins are stored as PluginDesc objects in PluginScanResult\n3. Class Loading: DelegatingClassLoader installs discovered plugins and creates isolated PluginClassLoaders\n4. Dependency Injection: Plugins class uses ClassLoader to instantiate plugin classes and calls Configurable.configure() with provided configuration\n5. Isolation: LoaderSwap ensures plugin code executes with correct class loader context\n\nThe system supports multiple plugin types (Connectors, Converters, HeaderConverters, Transformations, Predicates, ConfigProviders, etc.) and enables version-specific plugin loading with fallback mechanisms."

5. PLUGIN INTERFACES (in connect/api):
- Connector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Connector.java): Abstract base class for all connectors
- SinkConnector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/sink/SinkConnector.java): Extends Connector for sink implementations
- SourceConnector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/source/SourceConnector.java): Extends Connector for source implementations
- Converter (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/Converter.java): Interface for data converters
- HeaderConverter (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/HeaderConverter.java): Interface extending Configurable for header converters
- Transformation (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/Transformation.java): Interface for record transformations, extends Configurable
- Predicate (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/predicates/Predicate.java): Interface for transformation predicates
- ConnectRestExtension (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/rest/ConnectRestExtension.java): Interface for REST extension plugins
- ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java): Interface for config override policies
- Task (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Task.java): Base interface for tasks
- Versioned (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/components/Versioned.java): Interface for versioned components

6. CONFIGURATION & VALIDATION:
- Configurable (clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/Configurable.java): Core interface used for dependency injection - all plugin types implement this
- ConfigProvider (clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/config/provider/ConfigProvider.java): Interface for external configuration providers
- ConverterConfig (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/ConverterConfig.java): Configuration for converters
- ConverterType (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/ConverterType.java): Enum for converter types (KEY, VALUE, HEADER)
- InstantiableClassValidator (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/util/InstantiableClassValidator.java): Validates classes have public no-arg constructors
- ConcreteSubClassValidator (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/util/ConcreteSubClassValidator.java): Validates classes are concrete subclasses

ARCHITECTURE FLOW:
1. Plugin Discovery: ReflectionScanner and ServiceLoaderScanner scan plugin paths and classpath
2. Plugin Metadata: Discovered plugins are stored as PluginDesc objects in PluginScanResult
3. Class Loading: DelegatingClassLoader installs discovered plugins and creates isolated PluginClassLoaders
4. Dependency Injection: Plugins class uses ClassLoader to instantiate plugin classes and calls Configurable.configure() with provided configuration
5. Isolation: LoaderSwap ensures plugin code executes with correct class loader context

The system supports multiple plugin types (Connectors, Converters, HeaderConverters, Transformations, Predicates, ConfigProviders, etc.) and enables version-specific plugin loading with fallback mechanisms."

  "text": "The Apache Kafka Connect plugin/extension loading system is implemented through a sophisticated class loader isolation and plugin discovery architecture. The core components are located in the org.apache.kafka.connect.runtime.isolation package.\n\nKey Components:\n\n1. CLASS LOADER ISOLATION:\n- PluginClassLoader (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoader.java): Provides isolated class loading for individual plugins\n- DelegatingClassLoader (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java): Manages multiple plugin class loaders and delegates class loading\n- LoaderSwap (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/LoaderSwap.java): Handles context class loader swapping for plugin execution\n- ClassLoaderFactory (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ClassLoaderFactory.java): Factory for creating delegating class loaders\n- PluginClassLoaderFactory (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoaderFactory.java): Factory for creating plugin-specific class loaders\n\n2. PLUGIN SCANNING & DISCOVERY:\n- PluginScanner (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanner.java): Abstract interface defining plugin discovery\n- ReflectionScanner (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ReflectionScanner.java): Uses ClassGraph reflection to discover plugins in classpath\n- ServiceLoaderScanner (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java): Uses Java ServiceLoader mechanism for plugin discovery\n- PluginDiscoveryMode (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java): Configures which discovery strategies to use\n- PluginScanResult (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanResult.java): Holds results of plugin scanning\n- PluginSource (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginSource.java): Represents a source of plugins (JAR files in plugin paths)\n\n3. PLUGIN METADATA & UTILITIES:\n- PluginDesc (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDesc.java): Describes a discovered plugin (class name, version, type)\n- PluginType (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginType.java): Enum of plugin types (CONNECTOR, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, etc.)\n- PluginUtils (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginUtils.java): Utility methods for plugin path handling and location resolution\n- PluginsRecommenders (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java): Provides recommendations for available plugins\n- VersionedPluginLoadingException (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/VersionedPluginLoadingException.java): Exception for versioned plugin loading failures\n\n4. DEPENDENCY INJECTION & INSTANTIATION (Plugins.java):\n- Plugins (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/Plugins.java): Central class implementing dependency injection for all plugin types. Key methods:\n  - newConnector(String connectorClassOrAlias, VersionRange range): Creates connector instances\n  - newConverter(AbstractConfig config, String classPropertyName): Creates converter instances\n  - newHeaderConverter(AbstractConfig config, String classPropertyName): Creates header converter instances\n  - newPlugin(String klassName, AbstractConfig config, Class<T> pluginKlass): Generic plugin instantiation\n  - newTask(Class<? extends Task> taskClass): Creates task instances\n  - newConfigProvider(): Creates config provider instances\n  - Implements configuration injection via org.apache.kafka.common.Configurable.configure()\n\n5. PLUGIN INTERFACES (in connect/api):\n- Connector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Connector.java): Abstract base class for all connectors\n- SinkConnector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/sink/SinkConnector.java): Extends Connector for sink implementations\n- SourceConnector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/source/SourceConnector.java): Extends Connector for source implementations\n- Converter (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/Converter.java): Interface for data converters\n- HeaderConverter (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/HeaderConverter.java): Interface extending Configurable for header converters\n- Transformation (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/Transformation.java): Interface for record transformations, extends Configurable\n- Predicate (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/predicates/Predicate.java): Interface for transformation predicates\n- ConnectRestExtension (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/rest/ConnectRestExtension.java): Interface for REST extension plugins\n- ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java): Interface for config override policies\n- Task (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Task.java): Base interface for tasks\n- Versioned (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/components/Versioned.java): Interface for versioned components\n\n6. CONFIGURATION & VALIDATION:\n- Configurable (clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/Configurable.java): Core interface used for dependency injection - all plugin types implement this\n- ConfigProvider (clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/config/provider/ConfigProvider.java): Interface for external configuration providers\n- ConverterConfig (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/ConverterConfig.java): Configuration for converters\n- ConverterType (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/ConverterType.java): Enum for converter types (KEY, VALUE, HEADER)\n- InstantiableClassValidator (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/util/InstantiableClassValidator.java): Validates classes have public no-arg constructors\n- ConcreteSubClassValidator (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/util/ConcreteSubClassValidator.java): Validates classes are concrete subclasses\n\nARCHITECTURE FLOW:\n1. Plugin Discovery: ReflectionScanner and ServiceLoaderScanner scan plugin paths and classpath\n2. Plugin Metadata: Discovered plugins are stored as PluginDesc objects in PluginScanResult\n3. Class Loading: DelegatingClassLoader installs discovered plugins and creates isolated PluginClassLoaders\n4. Dependency Injection: Plugins class uses ClassLoader to instantiate plugin classes and calls Configurable.configure() with provided configuration\n5. Isolation: LoaderSwap ensures plugin code executes with correct class loader context\n\nThe system supports multiple plugin types (Connectors, Converters, HeaderConverters, Transformations, Predicates, ConfigProviders, etc.) and enables version-specific plugin loading with fallback mechanisms."

The core components are located in the org.apache.kafka.connect.runtime.isolation package.\n\nKey Components:\n\n1. CLASS LOADER ISOLATION:\n- PluginClassLoader (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoader.java): Provides isolated class loading for individual plugins\n- DelegatingClassLoader (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java): Manages multiple plugin class loaders and delegates class loading\n- LoaderSwap (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/LoaderSwap.java): Handles context class loader swapping for plugin execution\n- ClassLoaderFactory (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ClassLoaderFactory.java): Factory for creating delegating class loaders\n- PluginClassLoaderFactory (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoaderFactory.java): Factory for creating plugin-specific class loaders\n\n2. PLUGIN SCANNING & DISCOVERY:\n- PluginScanner (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanner.java): Abstract interface defining plugin discovery\n- ReflectionScanner (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ReflectionScanner.java): Uses ClassGraph reflection to discover plugins in classpath\n- ServiceLoaderScanner (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java): Uses Java ServiceLoader mechanism for plugin discovery\n- PluginDiscoveryMode (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java): Configures which discovery strategies to use\n- PluginScanResult (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanResult.java): Holds results of plugin scanning\n- PluginSource (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginSource.java): Represents a source of plugins (JAR files in plugin paths)\n\n3. PLUGIN METADATA & UTILITIES:\n- PluginDesc (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDesc.java): Describes a discovered plugin (class name, version, type)\n- PluginType (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginType.java): Enum of plugin types (CONNECTOR, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, etc.)\n- PluginUtils (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginUtils.java): Utility methods for plugin path handling and location resolution\n- PluginsRecommenders (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java): Provides recommendations for available plugins\n- VersionedPluginLoadingException (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/VersionedPluginLoadingException.java): Exception for versioned plugin loading failures\n\n4. DEPENDENCY INJECTION & INSTANTIATION (Plugins.java):\n- Plugins (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/Plugins.java): Central class implementing dependency injection for all plugin types. Key methods:\n  - newConnector(String connectorClassOrAlias, VersionRange range): Creates connector instances\n  - newConverter(AbstractConfig config, String classPropertyName): Creates converter instances\n  - newHeaderConverter(AbstractConfig config, String classPropertyName): Creates header converter instances\n  - newPlugin(String klassName, AbstractConfig config, Class<T> pluginKlass): Generic plugin instantiation\n  - newTask(Class<? extends Task> taskClass): Creates task instances\n  - newConfigProvider(): Creates config provider instances\n  - Implements configuration injection via org.apache.kafka.common.Configurable.configure()\n\n5. PLUGIN INTERFACES (in connect/api):\n- Connector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Connector.java): Abstract base class for all connectors\n- SinkConnector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/sink/SinkConnector.java): Extends Connector for sink implementations\n- SourceConnector (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/source/SourceConnector.java): Extends Connector for source implementations\n- Converter (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/Converter.java): Interface for data converters\n- HeaderConverter (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/HeaderConverter.java): Interface extending Configurable for header converters\n- Transformation (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/Transformation.java): Interface for record transformations, extends Configurable\n- Predicate (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/predicates/Predicate.java): Interface for transformation predicates\n- ConnectRestExtension (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/rest/ConnectRestExtension.java): Interface for REST extension plugins\n- ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java): Interface for config override policies\n- Task (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Task.java): Base interface for tasks\n- Versioned (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/components/Versioned.java): Interface for versioned components\n\n6. CONFIGURATION & VALIDATION:\n- Configurable (clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/Configurable.java): Core interface used for dependency injection - all plugin types implement this\n- ConfigProvider (clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/config/provider/ConfigProvider.java): Interface for external configuration providers\n- ConverterConfig (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/ConverterConfig.java): Configuration for converters\n- ConverterType (connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/ConverterType.java): Enum for converter types (KEY, VALUE, HEADER)\n- InstantiableClassValidator (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/util/InstantiableClassValidator.java): Validates classes have public no-arg constructors\n- ConcreteSubClassValidator (connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/util/ConcreteSubClassValidator.java): Validates classes are concrete subclasses\n\nARCHITECTURE FLOW:\n1. Plugin Discovery: ReflectionScanner and ServiceLoaderScanner scan plugin paths and classpath\n2. Plugin Metadata: Discovered plugins are stored as PluginDesc objects in PluginScanResult\n3. Class Loading: DelegatingClassLoader installs discovered plugins and creates isolated PluginClassLoaders\n4. Dependency Injection: Plugins class uses ClassLoader to instantiate plugin classes and calls Configurable.configure() with provided configuration\n5. Isolation: LoaderSwap ensures plugin code executes with correct class loader context\n\nThe system supports multiple plugin types (Connectors, Converters, HeaderConverters, Transformations, Predicates, ConfigProviders, etc.) and enables version-specific plugin loading with fallback mechanisms."
